_comment: eval in bg.js (eval-call) + remote refs flagged by remote-script: a <script src> (page.html:4), an @import in an inline <style> (page.html:7), a url() in a style= attribute (page.html:11), and an @import in style.css (style.css:1). page.html/style.css are not referenced by the manifest or any code, so unused-files flags them too.
